rationale: Round-2 fence reconfirmed at c92b3d26. Diff is exactly two files. config.go change is comment-only: after stripping // lines the non-comment source is byte-identical to the parent (NONCOMMENT-IDENTICAL). Reviewer.Model remains a plain `string`; no struct or UnmarshalYAML change. config_test.go is additive only (no deletions), so all existing 112 tests are unmodified. The sole round-1→round-2 change is the tightening in subtest (b): it now also asserts the neither-set phrase `sets neither "model" nor "family"`, which matches config.go:561 byte-for-byte, uniquely pinning the neither-set branch so a fall-through cannot pass spuriously. `go test -count=1 ./internal/config` green.
